Attachment.description: Attachment extension that describes an uploaded file and its resolved access URLs.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the attachment.

groupName.description: Attachment group metadata.name this attachment belongs to.

mediaType.description: Media type detected or supplied for the attachment, such as image/png.

policyName.description: Storage policy metadata.name used to store this attachment.

size.description: Size of the attachment in bytes.

tags.description: Free-form tags assigned to the attachment.

AttachmentSpec.description: Desired attachment metadata and storage placement.

permalink.description:
Public permalink for the attachment. Local storage usually exposes a public URL, while object storage may
 expose the object URL.

thumbnails.description: Generated thumbnail URLs keyed by thumbnail size name.

AuthProvider.description: Authentication provider extension that describes an external or form-based sign-in integration.

authenticationUrl.description: URL that starts the authentication flow.

bindingUrl.description: URL that starts account binding for an already signed-in user.

displayName.description: Display name shown on sign-in and account binding screens.

helpPage.description: Help page URL for users who need sign-in assistance.

logo.description: Logo URL or attachment URI for the provider.

method.description: HTTP method used when starting the authentication flow.

rememberMeSupport.description: Whether the provider supports remember-me during sign-in.

unbindUrl.description: URL that unbinds the external account from the current user.

AuthProviderSpec.description: Authentication provider metadata and endpoint configuration.

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time of backup file.

Category.description: Category extension for grouping posts and building category archives.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the category.

hideFromList.description:
Hides this root category tree and its posts from theme-side lists. Permalinks remain accessible, and only
 root categories are expected to set this flag.

postTemplate.description: Theme template used for posts in this category when the post does not specify its own spec.template.

preventParentPostCascadeQuery.description:
Stops parent category post queries from cascading into this category tree. Direct post queries for this
 category are unaffected.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the category permalink.

template.description: Theme template used to render the category archive page.

CategorySpec.description: Desired category display, hierarchy, and rendering configuration.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the category permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts in this category and all descendant categories.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts in this category and all descendant categories.

CategoryStatus.description: Observed category state derived by content reconcilers.

ChangeOwnPasswordRequest.description: Payload for changing the current user's password.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Payload for changing a user's password.

Comment.description: Comment extension for a post, single page, or another commentable subject.

avatar.description: Avatar URL of the guest commenter.

displayName.description: Display name of the guest commenter.

email.description: Email address of the guest commenter. It is used as the owner name when present.

website.description: Website URL of the guest commenter.

CommentEmailOwner.description: Guest/email owner information used when a comment is not owned by a Halo user.

annotations.description: Additional owner metadata, such as avatar, website, or email hash.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the owner.

kind.description: Owner identity kind. Built-in values are User and Email.

name.description: Owner identifier. For User owners, this is the User metadata.name; for Email owners, an email address.

CommentOwner.description: Identity of a comment or reply owner.

allowNotification.description: Whether to subscribe the owner to notifications for future replies.

content.description: Rendered HTML content for the comment. Unsafe HTML is rejected.

hidden.description: Whether the comment should be hidden from normal display.

raw.description: Original comment text submitted by the editor.

CommentRequest.description: Comment creation payload for console comment APIs.

allowNotification.description: Whether notification subscriptions should be created for this comment or reply.

approved.description: Whether the comment has passed moderation and may be visible.

approvedTime.description: Time when the comment was approved.

content.description: Rendered HTML content displayed to REST and theme consumers.

creationTime.description: Creation time supplied by the caller. If absent, metadata.creationTimestamp is used.

hidden.description: Whether the comment should be hidden from public REST and theme output.

ipAddress.description: IP address recorded when the comment was submitted.

lastReadTime.description: Latest time the comment owner has read replies for this comment.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

raw.description: Raw comment body submitted by the owner before HTML sanitization and rendering.

top.description: Whether the comment is pinned above normal comment ordering.

userAgent.description: Browser user agent recorded when the comment was submitted.

CommentSpec.description: Desired state of a top-level comment.

CommentStats.description: Aggregated counters for a comment or reply.

hasNewReply.description: Whether unreadReplyCount is greater than zero.

lastReplyTime.description: Creation time of the latest reply under this comment.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

replyCount.description: Total number of replies under this comment.

unreadReplyCount.description: Number of replies created after the comment owner's last read time.

visibleReplyCount.description: Total number of approved and non-hidden replies under this comment.

CommentStatus.description: Observed state of a top-level comment.

lastTransitionTime.description: Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about last transition. This may be an empty string.

reason.description: Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

status.description: Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase. example: Ready, Initialized. maxLength: 316.

Condition.description: EqualsAndHashCode 排除了lastTransitionTime否则失败时，lastTransitionTime 会被更新 导致 equals 为 false，一直被加入队列.

data.description: String key-value configuration entries consumed by Halo or plugins.

ConfigMap.description: ConfigMap holds configuration data to consume.

ConfigMapRef.description: Reference to a ConfigMap used by this provider.

content.description: Rendered HTML or normalized content derived from raw.

raw.description: Source text stored by the editor.

rawType.description: Editor/source format of the raw content, for example HTML or Markdown.

Content.description: Full content payload reconstructed from a content snapshot.

content.description: Rendered HTML or normalized content derived from raw.

raw.description: Source text stored by the editor.

version.description: Expected current head snapshot version; conflicts create a new head snapshot.

snapshotName.description: Name of the snapshot used to build this content.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

bio.description: biography or profile text of the user

name.description: user metadata.name, which also serves as the login name

password.description: raw password to set for the user

roles.description: role metadata.name values to grant to the user after creation

CreateUserRequest.description: Payload for creating a user from the console.

page.description: Custom templates available for single pages.

CustomTemplates.description: Custom template descriptors grouped by the content type they render.

DashboardStats.description: Dashboard statistics for the console overview.

DetailedUser.description: User detail response with resolved roles.

EmailVerifyRequest.description: Payload for sending an email verification code.

autoGenerate.description: Whether Halo should generate the excerpt from the released content automatically.

raw.description: Manual excerpt text used when autoGenerate is false.

Excerpt.description: Excerpt generation configuration for a post or single page.

Extension is an interface which represents an Extension. It contains setters and getters of GroupVersionKind and

modifyTime.description: Last modification time of the snapshot content.

ListedSnapshotSpec.description: Display fields for a content snapshot list item.

generateName.description: The name field will be generated automatically according to the given generateName field

version.description: Current version of the Extension. It will be bumped up every update.

kind.description: Owner kind, such as User or email.

presetName.description: Plugin preset name. Halo finds the plugin from plugin presets.

PluginInstallRequest.description: Multipart payload for installing a plugin.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

async.description: Whether to change the state asynchronously.

enable.description: Whether the plugin should be enabled.

PluginRunningStateRequest.description: Payload for changing a plugin running state.

configMapName.description: ConfigMap metadata.name storing plugin configuration values.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the plugin.

enabled.description: Whether the plugin should be enabled.

logo.description: Logo URL or attachment URI for the plugin.

pluginDependencies.description: Required plugin dependencies keyed by plugin name with version constraints as values.

settingName.description: Setting metadata.name used to render the plugin configuration form.

PluginSpec.description: Desired plugin metadata and configuration references.

entry.description: JavaScript bundle entry path served for the plugin UI.

lastProbeState.description: Last PF4J probe state observed for the plugin.

lastStartTime.description: Last time the plugin started successfully.

loadLocation.description: URI location where the plugin artifact was loaded from.

logo.description: Resolved logo URL or attachment URI for the plugin.

stylesheet.description: Stylesheet bundle path served for the plugin UI.

PluginStatus.description: Observed plugin lifecycle and runtime asset state.

apiGroups.description:
APIGroups is the name of the APIGroup that contains the resources. If multiple API groups are specified, any
 action requested against one of the enumerated resources in any API group will be allowed.

nonResourceURLs.description:
NonResourceURLs is a set of partial urls that a user should have access to. *s are allowed, but only as the
 full, final step in the path If an action is not a resource API request, then the URL is split on '/' and is
 checked against the NonResourceURLs to look for a match. Since non-resource URLs are not namespaced, this
 field is only applicable for ClusterRoles referenced from a ClusterRoleBinding. Rules can either apply to API
 resources (such as "pods" or "secrets") or non-resource URL paths (such as "/api"), but not both.

resourceNames.description:
ResourceNames is an optional white list of names that the rule applies to. An empty set means that everything
 is allowed.

resources.description:
Resources is a list of resources this rule applies to. '*' represents all resources in the specified
 apiGroups. '*/foo' represents the subresource 'foo' for all resources in the specified apiGroups.

verbs.description: Verbs allowed by this rule, such as get, list, create, update, patch, or delete.

PolicyRule.description:
PolicyRule holds information that describes a policy rule, but does not contain information about whom the rule
 applies to or which namespace the rule applies to.

Post.description: Post extension that stores article metadata, publication settings, taxonomy, and derived status.

PostRequest.description: Post editor payload containing the post extension and its editable content.

allowComment.description: Whether new comments are allowed for this post.

baseSnapshot.description: Base Snapshot metadata.name used to reconstruct raw and rendered content from patches.

categories.description: Category metadata.name values associated with the post.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the post.

deleted.description: Whether the post is logically deleted and should be treated as recycled.

headSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name containing the latest editable draft content.

htmlMetas.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the rendered post page head.

owner.description: User metadata.name of the post owner.

pinned.description: Whether the post should be pinned ahead of normal post ordering.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

publish.description: Desired publish state. False keeps the post as a draft or moves it back to draft.

publishTime.description: Time when the post was published or is scheduled to be published.

releaseSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name selected as the published content version.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the post permalink.

tags.description: Tag metadata.name values associated with the post.

template.description: Theme template used to render this post.

visible.description: Visibility used by theme-side and public REST queries; anonymous clients only receive PUBLIC posts.

PostSpec.description: Desired post content, publication, taxonomy, and rendering configuration.

commentsCount.description: Total number of comments associated with the content item.

conditions.description: Reconciliation conditions reported by controllers for this content item.

contributors.description: User metadata.name values that contributed to the content snapshots.

excerpt.description: Excerpt text resolved from the content excerpt configuration.

hideFromList.description: Whether any associated category hides this content item from theme-side lists.

inProgress.description: Whether the latest draft snapshot differs from the released snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last modification time of the released snapshot.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the content permalink policy.

phase.description: Current publishing phase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.

PostStatus.description: Observed post state derived by content reconcilers.

name.description: Extension name. This field is mandatory

Ref.description: Extension reference object. The name is mandatory

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.
A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

allowNotification.description: Whether to subscribe the owner to notifications for future replies.

content.description: Rendered HTML content for the reply. Unsafe HTML is rejected.

hidden.description: Whether the reply should be hidden from normal display.

quoteReply.description: Metadata name of the reply being quoted, if this reply quotes another reply.

raw.description: Original reply text submitted by the editor.

ReplyRequest.description: Reply creation payload for console comment APIs.

allowNotification.description: Whether notification subscriptions should be created for this comment or reply.

approved.description: Whether the comment has passed moderation and may be visible.

approvedTime.description: Time when the comment was approved.

content.description: Rendered HTML content displayed to REST and theme consumers.

creationTime.description: Creation time supplied by the caller. If absent, metadata.creationTimestamp is used.

hidden.description: Whether the comment should be hidden from public REST and theme output.

ipAddress.description: IP address recorded when the comment was submitted.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

quoteReply.description: Quoted Reply metadata.name when this reply responds to another reply.

raw.description: Raw comment body submitted by the owner before HTML sanitization and rendering.

top.description: Whether the comment is pinned above normal comment ordering.

userAgent.description: Browser user agent recorded when the comment was submitted.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

filename.description: Filename of backup file in backups root.

RestoreRequest.description: Multipart payload for restoring a backup.

snapshotName.description: snapshot metadata.name to restore as the post's head content

RevertSnapshotForPostParam.description: Request body for restoring post content from a snapshot.

snapshotName.description: snapshot metadata.name to restore as the single page's head content

RevertSnapshotForSingleParam.description: Request body for restoring single page content from a snapshot.

rules.description: Policy rules granted by this role.

Role.description: Role extension that defines RBAC policy rules for users and other subjects.

Setting.description: Setting extension that describes one or more configuration forms and their schema.

formSchema.description: FormKit-compatible schema used to render the form fields.

group.description: Stable form group name used to store submitted values.

label.description: Display label shown for this form group.

SettingForm.description: A single form group in a setting definition.

SettingRef.description: Reference to a setting definition used by this provider.

forms.description: Form groups rendered for this setting definition.

SettingSpec.description: Collection of form groups that make up this setting definition.

SinglePage.description: Single page extension that stores standalone page metadata, publication settings, and derived status.

SinglePageRequest.description: Single page editor payload containing the page extension and its editable content.

allowComment.description: Whether new comments are allowed for this single page.

baseSnapshot.description: Base Snapshot metadata.name used to reconstruct raw and rendered content from patches.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the single page.

deleted.description: Whether the single page is logically deleted and should be treated as recycled.

headSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name containing the latest editable draft content.

htmlMetas.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the rendered single page head.

owner.description: User metadata.name of the single page owner.

pinned.description: Whether the single page should be pinned ahead of normal page ordering.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Higher values sort before lower values where priority ordering is applied.

publish.description: Desired publish state. False keeps the single page as a draft or moves it back to draft.

publishTime.description: Time when the single page was published or is scheduled to be published.

releaseSnapshot.description: Snapshot metadata.name selected as the published content version.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the single page permalink.

template.description: Theme template used to render this single page.

title.description: Display title of the single page.

visible.description: Visibility used by theme-side and public REST queries; anonymous clients only receive PUBLIC single pages.

SinglePageSpec.description: Desired single page content, publication, and rendering configuration.

commentsCount.description: Total number of comments associated with the content item.

conditions.description: Reconciliation conditions reported by controllers for this content item.

contributors.description: User metadata.name values that contributed to the content snapshots.

excerpt.description: Excerpt text resolved from the content excerpt configuration.

hideFromList.description: Whether any associated category hides this content item from theme-side lists.

inProgress.description: Whether the latest draft snapshot differs from the released snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last modification time of the released snapshot.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the content permalink policy.

phase.description: Current publishing phase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.

SinglePageStatus.description: Observed single page state derived by content reconcilers.

totalComment.description: Total comment count, including comments that may not be approved.

Stats.description: Aggregated visit, upvote, and comment counters for a content resource.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

color.description: Display color of the tag in 3- or 6-digit hex notation, such as #fff or #ffffff.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the tag.

slug.description: URL slug used to build the tag permalink.

TagSpec.description: Desired tag display and rendering configuration.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the tag permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts associated with the tag.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts associated with the tag.

TagStatus.description: Observed tag state derived by content reconcilers.

description.description: Human-readable description of when to use this template.

file.description: Template file path relative to the theme templates directory.

name.description: Template display name shown to users.

screenshot.description: Screenshot URL or attachment URI for previewing the template.

TemplateDescriptor.description: Type used to describe custom template page.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

Theme.description: Theme extension that describes an installable frontend theme and its runtime state.

ThemeInstallRequest.description: Multipart payload for installing a theme.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

configMapName.description: ConfigMap metadata.name storing the theme configuration values.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the theme.

logo.description: Logo URL or attachment URI for the theme.

requires.description: Required Halo version range. The wildcard value means any Halo version.

settingName.description: Setting metadata.name used to render the theme configuration form.

version.description: Theme version. The wildcard value means any version.

ThemeSpec.description: Desired theme metadata and configuration references.

entry.description: Resolved Console/User Center UI JavaScript entry URL served from the theme root.

inDevelopment.description: Whether the theme appears to be a local development workspace.

location.description: Local filesystem location where the theme is loaded from.

screenshot.description: Resolved preview screenshot URL served from the theme root.

stylesheet.description: Resolved Console/User Center UI stylesheet URL served from the theme root.

ThemeStatus.description: Observed theme lifecycle and installation state.

uri.description: remote URI of the theme ZIP file

UpgradeFromUriRequest.description: Payload for upgrading a theme from a remote URI.

file.description: The file to upload. If not provided, the url will be used.

filename.description: The filename to use when uploading from url. If not provided, the filename will be extracted from the url.

url.description: The url to upload from. If not provided, the file will be used.

UploadForm.description: Upload form from console. The file and url are mutually exclusive. If both are provided, the file will be used.

url.description: remote file URL to transfer into storage

UploadFromUrlRequest.description: Request payload for creating an attachment from a remote URL.

User.description: User extension that stores profile, authentication, and account state for a Halo user.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

permissions.description: Role templates or permissions resolved from granted roles.

UserPermission.description: Resolved role and permission information for a user.

avatar.description: Avatar URL or attachment URI for the user.

bio.description: User biography shown on profile surfaces.

disabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled.

displayName.description: Display name shown for the user.

email.description: Email address used for sign-in and notifications.

emailVerified.description: Whether the email address has been verified.

loginHistoryLimit.description: Maximum number of login history entries retained for this user.

password.description: Password hash or encoded password value.

phone.description: Phone number associated with the user.

totpEncryptedSecret.description: Encrypted TOTP secret used for two-factor authentication.

twoFactorAuthEnabled.description: Whether two-factor authentication is enabled for this user.

UserSpec.description: Desired user profile and authentication settings.

permalink.description: Public permalink of the user's profile or author page.

UserStatus.description: Observed user state derived by the application.

password.description: current password of the authenticated user

VerifyCodeRequest.description: Payload for verifying an email address by code.
